team_name: Nexus: A Secure AI Command Layer for Cross-System Interoperability and Controlled Execution
summary: Design a secure AI command layer for cross-system interoperability between Karnataka's Single Window System and legacy department systems, using the Unique Business Identifier (UBID) as the common join key.
tech_stack: Auth0 Token Vault + Auth0 AI SDK
Google Gemini via Vercel AI SDK
key_steps: Policy-based execution control using risk classification
Secure token handling with zero credential exposure
optimization_claims: Enables safe adoption of AI agents in real-world systems without compromising security.
Improves visibility and control over AI actions.
Provides an audit trail for every action.
constraints_addressed: Credentials are often stored in insecure ways
No control over what the agent can or cannot do
No audit trail to verify behavior
